headline: Avery Dennison to Webcast Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
summary: MENTOR, Ohio, July 01, 2026--Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE: AVY), a leading global materials science and digital identification solutions company, today announced it will host its second quarter 2026 earnings conference call at 11:00 a.m. ET on Thursday, July 30, 2026. The company’s second quarter 2026 earnings release will be issued that morning at approximately 6:45 a.m. ET.
